title: ServiceStatus
description: Real-time service status update sent by the station to the app via BLE characteristic FFF5 (Notify). Provides ongoing progress of an active service session.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the service session

sessionId.description: Session identifier of the active service

elapsedSeconds.description: Number of seconds elapsed since the service started

remainingSeconds.description: Estimated number of seconds remaining for the service

meterValues.description: Optional real-time meter readings from the station hardware
